name: Šćepan Polje → Piva Canyon drive (via Plužine)
description: Border crossing from Bosnia into Montenegro. From here, drive the spectacular Piva river canyon road along Piva Lake through Plužine, continuing to Žabljak. One of the most scenic drives in Montenegro. ROADWORKS 2026: active works on the BA side (Brod na Drini/Foča → Hum) with slow traffic and temporary ~10-min stoppages, and the 24-tunnel Plužine section is earmarked for reconstruction (the new joint Šćepan Polje–Hum border post is still paperwork — no relief by June). Budget an extra 30–60 min on top of the 2.5–3h; daylight-only rule unchanged.

name: Plužine (Piva Lake)
description: Town on the turquoise Piva Lake, waypoint on the canyon drive from Šćepan Polje to Žabljak.

name: Žabljak
description: Mountain town, base for Durmitor National Park. Overnight base for the Durmitor hiking day(s).

name: Durmitor NP — Black Lake (Crno jezero)
description: Hiking in Durmitor National Park around Black Lake and nearby peaks. Planned route: Crno jezero → Veliki Međed (Sjeverni) mountain tour. As a standalone pin it's redundant — the shortlisted summit days start here anyway; kept as the built-in 'we're tired' fallback (easy lake loop, €5 NP + €2 parking).

name: Ostrog Monastery
description: Cliffside mountain monastery built into a vertical rock face. Stop on the way from Žabljak south towards Kotor.

name: Skadar Lake (Virpazar)
description: Largest lake in the Balkans. Options: kayaking on the lake, visiting a hillside winery, or skipping to the coast (Sveti Stefan beach) instead. Virpazar is the main base for boats/kayaks.

name: Sveti Stefan beach
description: Iconic fortified islet with pink-pebble beaches. STATUS for our dates: Aman Sveti Stefan reopens Jul 1, 2026 — three days AFTER we fly out — so the islet itself stays off-limits. The beaches around it are currently FREE (the €120-sunbed era is over; Queen's Beach becomes Aman-exclusive only after reopening), but there are no facilities (no showers/toilets). Reframed: a free swim + the classic roadside photo stop, not an 'iconic beach alternative'.
cost: Beaches free until Jul 1 2026 reopening; no facilities

name: Budva Old Town
description: Walled old town on the coast, also Montenegro's main nightlife/party hub. Stop between Skadar Lake and Kotor.

name: Kotor Old Town + San Giovanni Fortress hike
description: UNESCO old town in the Bay of Kotor. Plan: climb the fortress walls (San Giovanni) for the bay view, then wander the old town. From Kotor we return towards Dubrovnik.
bestTime: fortress climb early morning or late afternoon (heat)

name: Komovi mountains (optional)
description: Optional extra if we have time left from Croatia: summit one of the Komovi peaks or do a light hike. Off the main route (east Montenegro), so only if schedule allows.
